---
title: "Members"
page-layout: article
toc: false
---

<style>
.member-feature {
  display: flow-root;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
  padding-bottom: 1rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
}

.member-feature-photo {
  float: left;
  width: 170px;
  max-width: 30%;
  margin: 0.2rem 1.25rem 0.75rem 0;
  border-radius: 8px;
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
}

.member-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(210px, 1fr));
  gap: 1.2rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

.member-card {
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 1rem;
  background: #fff;
  text-align: center;
}

.member-photo,
.member-photo-placeholder {
  width: 130px;
  height: 130px;
  margin: 0 auto 0.75rem auto;
  border-radius: 8px;
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
  display: block;
}

.member-photo {
  object-fit: cover;
}

.member-photo-placeholder {
  background: #f3f3f3;
}

.member-card p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.member-list li {
  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
}
</style>

## Principal Investigator

::: {.member-feature}
![](images/thomas-girke.jpeg){.member-feature-photo alt="Portrait of Thomas Girke"}

### Thomas Girke

**Professor**  
Department of Botany and Plant Sciences  
University of California, Riverside

Research in the Girke lab focuses on genome biology, chemical genomics, bioinformatics, and the development of reproducible data analysis methods and software for large-scale omics research.
:::

## Current Members

::: {.member-grid}

::: {.member-card}
![](images/brendan-gongol.jpeg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Brendan Gongol"}
**Brendan Gongol**  
Postdoctoral Scholar
:::

::: {.member-card}
![](images/yuzhu-duan.jpeg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Yuzhu Duan"}
**Yuzhu Duan**  
Graduate Student, GGB
:::

::: {.member-card}
![](images/jianhai-zhang.jpg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Jianhai Zhang"}
**Jianhai Zhang**  
Graduate Student, GGB
:::

::: {.member-card}
![](images/le-zhang.jpg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Le Zhang"}
**Le Zhang**  
Graduate Student, GGB
:::

::: {.member-card}
![](images/kevin-horan.jpg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Kevin Horan"}
**Kevin Horan**  
Postdoctoral Scholar
:::

::: {.member-card}
![](images/austin-leong.jpg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Austin Leong"}
**Austin Leong**  
Programmer
:::

::: {.member-card}
![](images/gordon-mosher.jpeg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Gordon Mosher"}
**Gordon David Mosher**  
Undergraduate Student, Statistics
:::

::: {.member-card}
![](images/ponmathi-ramasamy.jpeg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Ponmathi Ramasamy"}
**Ponmathi Ramasamy**  
Undergraduate Student, Bioengineering
:::

::: {.member-card}
![](images/ryan-gates.jpg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Ryan Gates"}
**Ryan Gates**  
Undergraduate Student
:::

:::

## Alumni

### Former Postdoctoral Scholars

::: {.member-grid}

::: {.member-card}
![](images/daniela-cassol.jpeg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Daniela Cassol"}
**Daniela Cassol**  
Graduate Student
:::

::: {.member-card}
**Siddhartha Kanrar**  
Postdoctoral Scholar, Molecular Biology
:::

:::

::: {.member-list}
- **Pedro Rodrigues**
- **Varun Khanna**
- **Kei Iida**
:::

### Former Graduate Students

::: {.member-grid}

::: {.member-card}
![](images/tyler-backman.jpg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Tyler Backman"}
**Tyler Backman**  
Graduate Student
:::

::: {.member-card}
![](images/eddie-cao.jpg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Yiqun Eddie Cao"}
**Yiqun Eddie Cao**  
Graduate Student
:::

::: {.member-card}
![](images/ergude-bao.jpeg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Ergude Bao"}
**Ergude Bao**  
Graduate Student
:::

:::

::: {.member-list}
- **Qiong Jia**
- **Shiyuan Guo**
- **Yan Wang**
- **Jisu Ha**
- **Anna Charisi**
- **Jorge Rodriguez**
- **Hua Tran**
:::

### Former Undergraduate Researchers and Staff

::: {.member-list}
- **Xinyang Li**
- **Siddharth Sai**
- **Cindy Nguyen**
- **Anna Alber**
- **Şeydanur Tıkır**
- **Patrick Tran**
- **John Sharifi**
- **Rebecca Sun**
- **Chris Webber**
- **Aleksandr Levchuk**
- **Lei Wang**
- **Junmei Liu**
- **Shawn Lesniak**
- **Julian Krause**
- **Li-Chang Cheng**
- **Christoph Sapper**
- **Ronly Schlenk**
- **Jack Cui**
:::
